data.content:
## TASK SUMMARY
Fixed the bracket boundary comparison that double-counted income at thresholds.

## CODE CHANGES
Corrected the marginal accumulation and the boundary comparison in tax().

## TESTS ADDED
Added 5 tests at and around each bracket boundary.

## TEST RESULTS
30 passed, 0 failed
